currentState.summary: R72 Session 2 COMPLETE. Live agent evaluation: 74 scenarios, 225 turns, 0 errors through real Gemini Flash. 3-model judge panel (Gemini Pro + GPT-5.2 + Grok 4): behavioral consensus 4.1/10 (live baseline — down from 7.3 mock). ICC(2,1) overall 0.797 (Excellent). ADR-024 (sarcasm), ADR-025 (crisis) written. 25 ADRs total.

nextSteps.description: R73: Fix generic fallback trigger — router must recognize emotional/crisis continuations, not just per-message classification
R73: Tone calibration — reduce persona envelope enthusiasm, match guest energy level
R73: Multi-turn crisis persistence — crisis_active sticky state field
R73: Verify sarcasm detection wiring — detect_sarcasm_context() effect on specialist prompts
Deploy to GCP Cloud Run — first cosign + canary deployment

dominantFailures: Generic 'I'm your concierge' fallback on 15/20 scenarios
No crisis context persistence across conversation turns
Safety: first-turn crisis correct, follow-up turns degrade to generic
